message.content:
@startuml
actor ElementModel
participant CardModel
participant Publish
participant ElementView
participant DeckView
participant IOTech
participant DeckTechView

ElementModel -> ElementModel: encode
activate ElementModel
ElementModel -> CardModel: encode each CardModel
activate CardModel
CardModel -> StringCard: create
activate StringCard
StringCard --> CardModel
deactivate StringCard
CardModel --> ElementModel: return StringCardCollection
deactivate CardModel
deactivate ElementModel

ElementModel -> ElementModel: send
activate ElementModel
ElementModel -> Publish: send StringCardCollection
activate Publish
Publish -> ElementView: send StringCardCollection
activate ElementView
ElementView -> ElementView: Store StringCardCollection
deactivate ElementView
deactivate Publish
deactivate ElementModel

ElementModel -> ElementView: Show
activate ElementView
ElementView -> DeckView: GetDeckView
activate DeckView
DeckView -> IOTech: create
activate IOTech
IOTech -> DeckTechView: create
activate DeckTechView
DeckTechView --> IOTech
deactivate DeckTechView
IOTech --> DeckView: return
deactivate IOTech
DeckView -> DeckTechView: Show(StringCardCollection)
deactivate DeckView
deactivate ElementView
@enduml
